totems.name: No Totem
totems.effect: No totem event is active; baseline fishing conditions.

totems.name: Sundial Totem
totems.effect: Advances the in-game daylight cycle.
totems.obtainability: Personal Aquarium, Sunken Chests, Daily Shop, Sunstone Island (Sunstone Cave area)

totems.name: Clearcast Totem
totems.effect: Forces clear weather for a time.

totems.name: Tempest Totem
totems.effect: Summons rain (storm-friendly conditions).
totems.obtainability: Personal Aquarium, Sunken Chests, Terrapin Island (Terrapin Cave)

totems.name: Windset Totem
totems.effect: Summons wind weather.

totems.name: Smokescreen Totem
totems.effect: Summons fog (smoke) weather.
totems.obtainability: Personal Aquarium, Sunken Chests, Mushgrove Swamp

totems.name: Meteor Totem
totems.effect: Starts a meteor / streaking-star style event (cosmic spawns).
totems.obtainability: Personal Aquarium, Daily Shop, Sunken Chests, Treasure Chests, Roslit Volcano

totems.name: Starfall Totem
totems.effect: Starfall event—cosmic rarities and special fish windows.

totems.name: Aurora Totem
totems.effect: Triggers Aurora event (cosmic/aurora rarities).
totems.obtainability: Vendors, events (check wiki for current source)

totems.name: Eclipse Totem
totems.effect: Eclipse / dark-sky style event and associated spawns.

totems.name: Blizzard Totem
totems.effect: Summons a blizzard (cold storm) weather pattern.

totems.name: Avalanche Totem
totems.effect: Heavy cold / snowslide-style weather event.

totems.name: Blue Moon Totem
totems.effect: Blue Moon event window (rare moon spawns and mutations).
totems.price_c$: Varies; listed as purchasable (Blue Moon) in update notes

totems.name: Cursed Storm Totem
totems.effect: Cursed storm event—hazard and rare fish table shifts.

totems.name: Zeus Storm Totem
totems.effect: Major lightning storm (Zeus) event; top-tier value spikes.

totems.name: Poseidon's Wrath Totem
totems.effect: Sea-storm (Poseidon) event with strong ocean spawns.

totems.name: Mutation Totem
totems.effect: Summons a Mutation Surge (extra mutation weight on fish).
totems.obtainability: Personal Aquarium, Daily Shop, codes, etc.

totems.name: Shiny Totem
totems.effect: Shiny / Luminous-style surge to boost Shiny and related rolls.

totems.name: Sparkling Totem
totems.effect: Sparkling surge—boosts Sparkling and similar mutation rolls.

totems.name: Rainbow Totem
totems.effect: Rainbow event after rain; among the strongest value weather windows.

totems.name: Megalodon Hunt Totem
totems.effect: Starts or boosts Megalodon hunt event (boss encounter window).
totems.price_c$: Craft (Totem Carver) / 2,500,000 C$ class listings—verify in-game

totems.name: Kraken Hunt Totem
totems.effect: Starts or boosts Kraken hunt event.

totems.name: Scylla Hunt Totem
totems.effect: Starts or boosts Scylla hunt event.

totems.name: Colossal Dragon Hunt Totem
totems.effect: Colossal Dragon hunt / apex boss window.

totems.name: Frightful Pool Totem
totems.effect: Frightful / seasonal pool event (limited fish pool).

source_note: Official Fisch Wiki — edit this file or run npm run seed:totems after changing data.json merge rules.
